'''Gardulla Oola''' was a cheap [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] and [[Casino/Legends|casino]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. The establishment featured both [[Dame Needa]], a dancer who impersonated the ill-fated Twi'lek [[Oola/Legends|Oola]], and the [[Adukis]] who performed the [[Whirling Kavadango Dance]].
